subject: English Language
instructions: Rewrite each sentence according to the instructions given without changing the meaning.

question.A: The chief and his headmen are attending an important meeting in the palace.

questions.answer: The chief, along with his headmen, is attending an important meeting in the palace.

question.A: The learners will not leave the school until they finish cleaning the surroundings.

questions.answer: Not until the learners finish cleaning the surroundings will they leave the school.

question.A: Mvila cannot go to Solwezi if she does not ask for permission from her mother.

questions.answer: Unless Mvila asks for permission from her mother, she cannot go to Solwezi.

question.A: Both Mviza and Mwaka are not attending the wedding.

questions.answer: Neither Mviza nor Mwaka is attending the wedding.

question.A: Since the farmers have harvested their crops, they can start selling.

questions.answer: Now that the farmers have harvested their crops, they can start selling.

question.A: Immediately the children saw the dogs, they started running away.

questions.answer: No sooner had the children seen the dogs than they started running away.

question.A: He likes eating bananas more than oranges.

questions.answer: He prefers eating bananas to oranges.
Felix looks down upon elderly people.

question.A: "I will check all your exercise books if you finish this work on time," said the teacher.

questions.answer: The teacher said that he would check all their exercise books if they finished that work on time.
